moments.title: The Open Championship Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship at Royal Birkdale concluded yesterday, July 19, crowning a new Champion Golfer of the Year.

angles.name: Final Day Buzz
angles.copy: Did you tune in for the final dramatic putts at Royal Birkdale yesterday? The 154th Open Championship delivered all the golf drama we could ask for!

angles.name: Weekend Recap
angles.copy: From Thursday's first tee to Sunday's final round, The Open at Royal Birkdale was unmissable. Who was your standout player of the tournament?

moments.title: Commonwealth Games Begin in Glasgow
moments.blurb: The XXIII Commonwealth Games, known as Glasgow 2026, officially begin on July 23, with the opening ceremony at the OVO Hydro, running until August 2.

angles.name: Ready for Glasgow
angles.copy: Get ready, Glasgow! The Commonwealth Games kick off this Thursday, bringing world-class sport and a festival atmosphere to Scotland.

angles.name: Opening Ceremony Anticipation
angles.copy: The countdown is on to the Glasgow 2026 Commonwealth Games opening ceremony on Thursday! What events are you most excited to watch?

angles.name: Scottish Talent
angles.copy: With Glasgow hosting the Commonwealth Games, we're buzzing to see Scotland's athletes shine on home turf! Who are you backing?

moments.title: Formula 1 Hungarian Grand Prix
moments.blurb: Formula 1 heads to the Hungaroring this weekend for the Hungarian Grand Prix, with practice starting Friday, July 24, qualifying Saturday, and the race on Sunday, July 26.

angles.name: Hungary Race Weekend
angles.copy: F1 is back this weekend! Get set for high-speed action at the Hungarian Grand Prix from Friday. Who's taking pole position?

angles.name: Track Talk
angles.copy: The Hungaroring always delivers drama! All eyes on Hungary this weekend for the next Formula 1 Grand Prix.

moments.title: TRNSMT Festival Concludes
moments.blurb: TRNSMT Festival at Glasgow Green concludes today, July 20, after a weekend of headline performances from acts like Richard Ashcroft, Kasabian, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: TRNSMT Wrap Up
angles.copy: That's a wrap for TRNSMT Festival at Glasgow Green! What an incredible weekend of music. Who was your highlight?

angles.name: Glasgow Green Vibes
angles.copy: The final day of TRNSMT is here! If you were at Glasgow Green this weekend, tell us your favourite moment!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Begins
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival kicks off this Thursday, July 23, at Henham Park in Suffolk, bringing four days of music, arts, and culture.

angles.name: Latitude Calling
angles.copy: Suffolk, are you ready? Latitude Festival begins this Thursday with a packed lineup of music, comedy, and arts!

angles.name: Festival Forecast
angles.copy: The countdown to Latitude is officially on! Who are you most excited to see at Henham Park this weekend?

moments.title: Truck Festival Kicks Off
moments.blurb: Truck Festival, Oxfordshire's longest-running independent music festival, starts this Thursday, July 23, at Hill Farm, Steventon.

angles.name: Ready for Truck Fest
angles.copy: Truck Festival is back! Oxfordshire gets its annual dose of indie, rock, and more starting this Thursday. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Independent Vibes
angles.copy: Celebrating independent music this weekend as Truck Festival opens its gates. What's your top tip for first-time attendees?

moments.title: WOMAD Festival Begins
moments.blurb: The World of Music, Arts and Dance (WOMAD) Festival commences this Thursday, July 23, at Charlton Park, Wiltshire, celebrating global cultures.

angles.name: Global Rhythms
angles.copy: WOMAD Festival is almost here! Get ready to immerse yourself in a world of music, arts, and dance starting this Thursday in Wiltshire.

angles.name: Cultural Celebration
angles.copy: Beyond the music, WOMAD is a feast for the senses! What's your favourite part of this incredible celebration of world culture?

moments.title: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean Hold UK #1
moments.blurb: Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is the current UK #1 single (chart announced July 17), marking its 15th non-consecutive week at the top and becoming the longest-running #1 by a British act.

angles.name: Chart Topper Reign
angles.copy: Fifteen weeks at #1! Sam Fender & Olivia Dean's 'Rein Me In' is making history on the UK Singles Chart. Listen now to the longest-running British #1!

angles.name: British Chart History
angles.copy: Huge congrats to Sam Fender & Olivia Dean! 'Rein Me In' is officially the longest-running British #1. What's your favourite lyric?

moments.title: World Cup Fever Hits UK Chart
moments.blurb: The latest UK Singles Chart (announced July 17) sees Oasis's 'Wonderwall' re-enter at #2 and Baddiel, Skinner & The Lightning Seeds' 'Three Lions' at #3, fueled by World Cup excitement.

angles.name: Football's Coming Home (Again)
angles.copy: World Cup fever has sent 'Wonderwall' and 'Three Lions' soaring back up the charts! Are you still singing along?

angles.name: Chart Comeback
angles.copy: Oasis and 'Three Lions' back in the top 3! The power of football on the UK Singles Chart is undeniable. Which track are you playing loudest?

moments.title: Love Island Nearing Climax
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK is entering its final week, with the grand finale expected around Monday, July 27, after weeks of villa drama.

angles.name: Love Island Final Week
angles.copy: It's the FINAL WEEK of Love Island! Who are your bets for the winning couple, and what's been the biggest shock of the series?

angles.name: Villa Drama
angles.copy: The Love Island villa is heating up for the grand finale! Has your favourite couple made it through, or has a bombshell changed everything?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', turns 79 today, born July 20, 1947.

angles.name: Santana's Day
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Carlos Santana! What's your favourite riff or track from the guitar legend?

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Carlos Santana on his 79th birthday! Still rocking after all these years. What's his song that instantly transports you?

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: Influential singer-songwriter Cat Stevens, also known as Yusuf Islam, celebrates his 78th birthday tomorrow, born July 21, 1948.

angles.name: Tomorrow's Legend
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 78th birthday of the legendary Cat Stevens / Yusuf Islam! Which of his timeless songs is your absolute favourite?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From 'Father and Son' to 'Wild World', Cat Stevens' music is unforgettable. Wishing him a very happy 78th birthday for tomorrow!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder of the Eagles and successful solo artist, turns 79 tomorrow, born July 21, 1947.

angles.name: Eagles Drummer's Birthday
angles.copy: Tomorrow, Don Henley of The Eagles celebrates his 79th birthday! What's your favourite Eagles track or solo hit featuring his distinctive voice?

angles.name: Hotel California Star
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 79th to the legendary Don Henley for tomorrow! A true rock icon, both with The Eagles and as a solo artist.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Pop superstar, actress, and producer Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, born July 22, 1992.

angles.name: Selena's Day
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez on Wednesday! What's your favourite Selena song or role?

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Celebrating Selena Gomez's 34th birthday this Wednesday! A true multi-talent who continues to inspire. Which of her hits is always on your playlist?

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses guitar icon Slash (Saul Hudson) celebrates his 61st birthday this Thursday, born July 23, 1965.

angles.name: Guitar God's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the one and only Slash this Thursday! That top hat and those riffs are legendary. What's your favourite GNR track?

angles.name: Iconic Riffs
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Slash on his 61st birthday this week! His guitar solos are pure rock history. Which one gives you chills?

moments.title: Happy 57th Birthday, Jennifer Lopez
moments.blurb: Global superstar Jennifer Lopez celebrates her 57th birthday this Friday, born July 24, 1969.

angles.name: JLo's Birthday
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the incredible Jennifer Lopez this Friday! From music to movies, she truly does it all. What's your favourite JLo anthem?

angles.name: Jenny From The Block
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only JLo on her 57th birthday this week! Her energy is unmatched. Which of her tracks makes you want to dance?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Mick Jagger
moments.blurb: The legendary frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday this Sunday, born July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Rock Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 83rd Birthday to the iconic Mick Jagger this Sunday! The Rolling Stones legend still has all the moves. What's your favourite Stones classic?

angles.name: Still Rolling
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Mick Jagger on his 83rd birthday this weekend! A true rock and roll pioneer. Which of his performances stands out most to you?

moments.title: Summer School Holidays Underway
moments.blurb: Summer school holidays are starting across the UK, with England's breaking up from July 23, Scotland from July 21, Wales already from June 27, and Northern Ireland from July 28.

angles.name: School's Out For Summer!
angles.copy: The summer holidays are officially here (or nearly here!) for schools across the UK! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun Time
angles.copy: With schools breaking up this week across much of the UK, it's time for summer adventures! What's your favourite family activity for the holidays?

angles.name: Wales Already On Break
angles.copy: For our listeners in Wales, the summer holidays started weeks ago! What fun have you been having? For England, Scotland, and NI, it's almost time!
